author: lOrm
content: Fixed via validate_base_url() in src/config/provider.rs:25 (delegates to crate::web::validate_url SSRF guard from #290). Wired into load_config in src/config/mod.rs after deserialization. 8 tests: validate_base_url_accepts_public_https, validate_base_url_rejects_file_scheme, validate_base_url_rejects_data_scheme, validate_base_url_rejects_ftp_scheme, validate_base_url_rejects_metadata_ip, validate_base_url_rejects_metadata_hostname, validate_base_url_rejects_rfc1918_private, validate_base_url_rejects_malformed. cargo test --lib: 1252 passed. cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features: exit 0.
